assessmentQuestionVersion.name: Advanced Management of Critical Illness
assessmentQuestionVersion.questionText: ^These include but are not restricted to: providing admission or consultative services for critically ill patients; management of ethical, regulatory or legal issues related to critically ill patients; management of complex airway emergencies, coronary ischemia, arrhythmia and cardiogenic shock, gastrointestinal hemorrhage and shock, sepsis and septic shock, cerebral ischemia, cerebral infection, seizure, and post-resucitative injury, complex nutritional dilemmas and malnutrition, respiratory failure and severe lung disease, renal failure, electrolyte and metabolic emergencies, complex resuscitation interventions and shock, multi-system trauma and surgical illness
